heading: Administrative expenses
label: 41765 Administrative expenses
text: In carrying out this subchapter, the Secretary shall use funds made available by appropriations to the Department of Transportation for the purpose of administration, in addition to the proceeds of any fees collected under this subchapter, to cover administrative expenses of the Federal credit instrument program under this subchapter.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable only to fiscal years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2000 Amendments note under .Sept. 30, 1999section 3 of Pub. L. 106–181section 106 of this title
